# Yogesh Shrestha — Frontend Engineer Portfolio

Yogesh Shrestha is a Frontend Engineer from Kathmandu, Nepal with 4 years of experience building production Vue 3 / Nuxt 3 SPAs for AI SaaS platforms and Web3 applications.

## About

- Name: Yogesh Shrestha
- Role: Frontend Engineer
- Location: Kathmandu, Nepal
- Specialisation: Vue 3, Nuxt 3, TypeScript, Pinia, Web3, AI integration
- Available for: Remote contract, full-time roles

## Core Skills

- Vue 3 / Nuxt 3 (SSR & SPA)
- TypeScript, JavaScript
- Pinia state management
- Vuetify 3, Tailwind CSS, SCSS
- Web3 / Aptos SDK / Move smart contracts
- AI streaming chat UIs, real-time markdown rendering
- REST APIs, GraphQL, Axios
- DOMPurify, content security
- Vitest, GSAP, jsPDF

## Projects

- [Mokshya AI](https://mokshya.ai): AI-powered cybersecurity platform for penetration testing, vulnerability analysis, compliance auditing (ISO 27001, PCI DSS, SOC 2), and document security review. Users interact through a streaming AI chat with document upload (PDF/DOCX). Built with Nuxt 3, Vue 3, Vuetify 3, Pinia, TypeScript, GraphQL, and DOMPurify.

- [Wapal](https://wapal.io): Leading NFT creation and trading platform on the Aptos blockchain. Handles wallet connections (Petra & Martian), NFT minting flows, on-chain collection management, and marketplace UI. Built with Nuxt 3, Aptos SDK, and Move smart contracts.

- [Mokshya Protocol](https://mokshya.io): Public website for a multi-chain Web3 open-source organisation building smart contracts, SDKs, infrastructure, and dApps across Ethereum, Bitcoin, Aptos, Solana, and Sui. SSR Nuxt 3 frontend with a headless WordPress blog via GraphQL.

- [This Portfolio](https://yogeshshrestha9.com.np): Anime-RPG themed portfolio site. Built with Vanilla JS, GSAP animations, and Vite.
